name: Go Toolchain
description: Verify, test, and format Go code using the standard Go toolchain.
instructions: Use go_vet to catch suspicious constructs, go_test to run unit tests (scope by package path when practical), go_fmt to normalize formatting, and go_build to confirm the module compiles. Prefer narrower package paths (e.g. ./internal/foo/...) over ./... when the user's change is localized.

tools.name: go_vet
tools.description: Run `go vet` on the given package path (default ./...) to report suspicious constructs.

tools.name: go_test
tools.description: Run `go test` for the given package path with race detection enabled.

tools.name: go_fmt
tools.description: Run `gofmt -l` to list files needing formatting under the given path (default .).

tools.name: go_build
tools.description: Run `go build` on the given package path to confirm the module compiles.
